name: Cilantro Lime Salsa Fresca
recipeIngredient: 3 large tomatoes or 5-6 plum tomatoes, diced small
1 jalapeno or other hot pepper, diced (you decide if you want to seed it or not)
Juice of 2 limes, or one lemon and one lime
Salt to taste (I like a lot, but if you're watching your sodium intake...)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes into small pieces.
2. Dice the onion and jalapeno (remove seeds if desired).
3. Squeeze the juice from 2 limes (or one lemon and one lime) into a bowl.
4. Add the diced cilantro to the bowl with the lime juice.
5. Season with salt to taste (add more for a stronger flavor, or less if you prefer lower sodium).
6. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
7. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight before serving.
